abstract: Although bacteriophages are highly abundant in the gut microbiome, little is known about their potential effects on gut bacteria. In this issue of Cell Host & Microbe, Hryckowian et al. (2020) and Fujimoto et al. (2020) combined metagenomic analysis and experiments to study phage-bacteria associations in order to develop future research tools and therapies.
title: Phage-Bacteria Associations: Analyze. Match. Develop Therapies.
